subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Render thanks unto God, thy Lord, inasmuch as thy name hath been mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One in His Most Great Prison, and He hath remembered thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین اشکر الله ربک بما حضر اسمک لدی المظلوم فی سجنه الاعظم و ذکرک
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @exhortations and counsels, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
